findings.title: Non-atomic balance update in deposit
findings.description: Read-modify-write on Balance field without synchronization allows concurrent deposits to overwrite each other

findings.title: TOCTOU in withdraw balance check
findings.description: Balance check and subtraction are not atomic, allowing concurrent withdrawals to overdraw the account

findings.title: Non-atomic cross-account transfer
findings.description: Transfer modifies two account balances without synchronization, breaking conservation invariant

findings.title: TOCTOU in ticket reservation
findings.description: Availability check and decrement are not atomic, allowing overselling of tickets

findings.title: TOCTOU in inventory order processing
findings.description: Stock check and decrement through map are not atomic, allowing inventory to go negative

findings.title: Non-thread-safe singleton config initialization
findings.description: GetConfig uses check-then-create without synchronization, allowing multiple singleton instances

findings.title: Non-atomic shared counter increment
findings.description: Read-sleep-write on shared counter variable causes lost updates under concurrent goroutine access
